title: Calculator
description: A Minecraft mod that does simple math calculations in-game for you!
body:
# Calculator

This mod adds a /math command that can solve simple math equations in-game!

---

### Supported Versions

- 1.20.4

**Support for this project has been discontinued.**

---

### Features

/math [num1] [operation] [num2]

Operations:

"+", "plus", "add"

"-", "minus", "subtract"

"times", "multiply"

"dividedby", "divide"

---

### Contact

### Extra Info

Supported Languages:

- English
